name: Canyon View
description_short: Canyon View Elementary is a public K-5 school in the Irvine Unified School District, not a financial services company.
description_long:
Canyon View Elementary is a public elementary school operated by the Irvine Unified School District (IUSD) in Irvine, California. The school serves students in kindergarten through fifth grade and is located on the IUSD campus. Based on the website content, this is an educational institution focused on student achievement, attendance, community engagement, and extracurricular programming—not a consumer finance or lending operation of any kind.

The school offers standard K-5 educational services including classroom instruction, a 100 Mile Club fitness program, Hour of Code computer science education, multi-cultural festivals, yearbook programs, child care services, and parent engagement through PTA and ParentSquare communication platforms. The school has earned recognition as a National Blue Ribbon School and California Distinguished School, indicating academic excellence within the public education system.

Canyon View distinguishes itself through community-oriented programming, student recognition systems (STAR values: Show Resilience, Take Responsibility, Act with Compassion, Reach for Respect), PBIS Gold recognition for positive behavioral intervention, and active parent volunteer opportunities. The school maintains strong attendance policies and clear communication channels with families through multiple platforms.

This company profile represents a fundamental miscategorization error. Canyon View Elementary is a public school, not a payday lender, alternative lending service, credit union, or any other consumer finance provider. Listing it in CreditDoc's payday-alternatives category is factually incorrect and suggests a data quality issue in the source system. The website URL ending in .iusd.org confirms this is an educational institution under the Irvine public school district domain. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
